videos.headline: Carson Beck throws costly INT as Bama thwarts Georgia's late comeback
videos.description: Carson Beck lobs pass to the end zone, but it's intercepted by Alabama freshman Zabien Brown to seal the Crimson Tide's exhilarating victory.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Carson Beck throws back-breaking INT as Alabama thwarts Georgia's late comeback) 2024/9/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: No. 4 Bama survives late Georgia surge for thrilling win
videos.description: Despite blowing a 28-0 lead, No. 4 Alabama hangs on to defeat No. 2 Georgia 41-34 in a thrilling finish on Saturday.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (No. 4 Bama survives late Georgia surge for thrilling win) 2024/09/28 ESHEET SOTFULL
